titles.title: Zhen Dao Ge 2: Jiangjun Xie Yin

data.title: Zhen Dao Ge 2nd Season
title_synonyms: Zhen Dao Ge 2: Jiangjun Xie Yin
data.synopsis:
Following the clues, He Fangzhi and Aya finally found the mastermind behind the murder of Lord Lin. Afterwards, they went to Fengming Mountain, entrusted by the Pavilion Master, to rescue someone in the Northwest… Along the way, He Fangzhi encountered all sorts of people, some in high positions, others in the martial world. Each had their own choices and, in their own way, upheld what they believed in!

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.synopsis: The director's version of the film retells the events of the last three episodes of the series with the addition of some changes.

data.title: Modaete yo, Adam-kun
data.synopsis:
This is the story of a boy who became the lone Adam among four billion Eves. In a world where a pandemic has rendered all men impotent, high school student Itsuki is the sole exception. In order to protect this secret, he transfers to a very special high school, which turns out to be composed 90% of girls!

There, he encounters an upbeat and friendly senior, a sexually frustrated female teacher, a tomboyish school "prince," and an heiress from a wealthy family. For Itsuki, who has his pick of any woman in the world, the question remains: which one will he choose?

(Source: Official site, edited)

data.title: Kuramerukagari
data.synopsis:
This is a story that weaves together people and a town. A coal mining town crowded with small-scale excavators, commonly known as the "Hakoniwa." In this town that changes daily like a labyrinth, there's a girl named Kagari who runs a mapmaking business and a boy named Yuya who dreams of breaking free from the "Hakoniwa." Eventually, the two, along with the unique residents of the town, find themselves confronting a conspiracy that shakes the entire town. The fate of the” Hakoniwa" depends on Kagari's drawings on the map.

(Source: ANN)

titles.title: Painting Jianghu: The Legend of Tiangang
Painting Rivers and Lakes: The Legend of Gangster

data.title: Hua Jianghu: Tiangang
title_synonyms: Painting Jianghu: The Legend of Tiangang
Painting Rivers and Lakes: The Legend of Gangster
data.synopsis:
During the reign of Emperor Da Zhou, the political situation was turbulent, and treacherous officials held power. Bu Liang Ren, a secret assassination organization directly under the emperor, suddenly lost its leader overnight, and their chief, Yuan Tiangang, resigned with a letter. Lost and directionless, Yuan Tiangang, guided by a brocade pouch left by his friend Li Chunfeng, arrived at the Anle Pavilion in Chang'an, only to discover it was a brothel. What followed, with the appearance of those seeking freedom, immortality, and power, set a new stage in Yuan Tiangang's journey…

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: ライジングインパクト

data.title: Rising Impact
data.title_japanese: ライジングインパクト
data.synopsis:
A young boy, Gawain, lives in a mountainous, rural area with an incredible love for golf and making the ball really fly. One day he runs into a visitor to the small area and she introduces him to a sport that can really make a ball take to flight: golf! It just takes one shot and Gawain is hooked. With his grandpa's approval he sets off to Tokyo with this mysterious woman to learn all he can about golf, encountering many colorful characters and obstacles along the way.

(Source: mangatraders)
